zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia DeBaliol於1249年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆巴納德 卡素時，她的父親John de Balliol11246歲，母親Devorguilla of Galloway39歲。她至少有1個兒子。她去世於1300年在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia DeBaliol was born in 1249, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Balliol, was 11246 and her mother, Devorguilla of Galloway, was 39. She had at least 1 son. She died in 1300, in Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia DeBaliol est née en 1249, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Balliol, avait 11246 ans et sa mère, Devorguilla of Galloway, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia DeBaliol(이)가 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Balliol(은)는 11246세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Devorguilla of Galloway(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia DeBaliol родилась в 1249 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Balliol было 11246 лет, а матери, которую звали Devorguilla of Galloway, 39. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
